security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' nclient-image: http://nclient-image.localhost https://nclient-image.localhost asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: https://*

bundle.longDescription: NClientT is an unofficial cross-platform desktop client for nhentai — browse, search, read, and download galleries on Windows, macOS, and Linux. A full rewrite of NClientV3 using Tauri 2 and Vue 3.
